text.title: Competitor Analysis Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Fewer than 5 competitors; competitor entries missing type/dimensions/sources; positioning_matrix, gaps, positioning_statement absent; geography unspecified.

list.pattern: Any factual cell without a sources URL.
Competitor list dominated by US companies when geography is EU/APAC.
Positioning statement mirroring a competitor feature instead of attacking a weakness.
